binding: ANCHORS prove the deterministic engine reproduces art-shaped tiers to the digit at the art scaleFactor (5, the SCALE_BY_CATEGORY default). FIELD_GOLDEN are documented reference cases with expert-known market positioning under the provenance-first, artist-gated model: a documented (confirmed) artist + an unbroken documented provenance chain + no attribution red flags -> Gold; a documented artist with no provenance -> Silver; a photomechanical reproduction sold as an original -> Flagged. This is the soft-launch basis; physical owner objects and dealer/auction lots (with expert-assigned tiers) deepen the set as they land. The negative (reproduction) is present per Acceptance B. Honesty ceiling holds absolutely: the engine verifies the documentary record, it never authenticates authorship of the object.

anchors.name: Documented artist, catalogue + auction provenance, unbroken chain
Documented artist, attributed work, thin provenance
Photomechanical reproduction presented as an original

field_golden.name: Documented artist + catalogue/auction provenance + unbroken dealer->owner chain
field_golden.groundTruthSource: Reference-case market positioning: a work by a documented artist (museum/auction/askART) with a published catalogue-raisonne or auction record and an unbroken documented provenance chain, no attribution red flags, sits Gold in the market. Verified against the documentary record; NOT an authentication of the object.

field_golden.name: Documented artist, no documented provenance
field_golden.groundTruthSource: Reference-case positioning: a confirmed documented artist but no documented provenance chain sits Silver (identity supported, custody unproven) under the artist-gated model.

field_golden.name: Photomechanical reproduction sold as an original painting
field_golden.groundTruthSource: Reference-case negative (Acceptance B): a print / mechanical reproduction presented as an original is a material + attribution fraud and must fail to Flagged regardless of a supplied story.
